description: LAYOUT: Square ad with a warm lifestyle photo taking up the top ~70% and a coral/salmon-colored trust badge bar across the bottom ~15%. The photo shows a smiling pregnant woman holding a large U-shaped pillow. Text overlays are positioned on the right side of the image. PRODUCT: The product (pregnancy pillow) is shown in-use by the model, held against her body, in a blush/pink color. The pillow occupies about 40% of the image area. HEADLINE: 'Ultimate Comfort for Expecting Moms' in a dark navy/charcoal serif font, positioned top-right of the image. 'Expecting Moms' is larger and bolder, roughly 24px equivalent. Brand logo 'Quilt Comfort' appears top-left in small text with a monogram icon. SUBTEXT: Four feature callouts stacked vertically on the right side: '53 x 34 Inches XL Size', 'Imported Non-Heating Velvet', 'Virgin Microfiber Filling', 'Superior Ergonomic Design' -- each in dark text approximately 12px, with thin horizontal separator lines between them. CTA: No explicit CTA button. Instead, a bottom trust bar spans the full width with a coral/salmon background (#F4845F approx) containing four badges with small icons: 'Express Delivery', '14-Nights Trial', '6-Months Warranty', 'Cash On Delivery', each with a small circular icon above in dark red/coral. COLORS: Background is a soft peachy-cream (#FDE8D8 approx), text is dark charcoal (#2D2D2D), accents are coral/salmon (#F4845F), pillow is blush pink. SPACING: Generous padding around text elements, ~16px between feature lines. MOOD: Warm, maternal, trustworthy, soft. Clean and informational with lifestyle warmth.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a minimal, clean white/off-white background (#F5F5F5). The product image sits in the lower-left quadrant, and text is right-aligned in the center-right area. A brand logo bar sits at the very bottom center. Two-column asymmetric layout -- product left, copy right. PRODUCT: A pair of all-black chunky low-top sneakers shown at a 3/4 angle, slightly overlapping. They occupy about 30% of the image, positioned in the left-center area. Shadow beneath gives depth. HEADLINE: 'APEX TRIPLE BLACK SNEAKER' in bold black uppercase sans-serif (likely Helvetica/Arial Black style), approximately 28px, right-aligned in the center-right area. Strong typographic hierarchy. SUBTEXT: 'NOW AVAILABLE' in smaller uppercase tracking-wide sans-serif, centered beneath headline, approximately 14px, gray or black. Below that: '*WHILE STOCKS LAST' in small red/coral uppercase text (~10px). CTA: 'SHOP NOW' in white text on a solid black rectangular button, approximately 160px wide x 40px tall, with no border-radius (sharp corners). Positioned below the subtitle. COLORS: Background is off-white/light gray (#F5F5F5), text is black (#000000), CTA button is black with white text, urgency text is red (#E74C3C approx). SPACING: Very generous whitespace, product floats in space. About 40px between headline and CTA. Brand logo 'REPRESENT' in black uppercase at bottom center. MOOD: Premium, minimalist, luxury streetwear. High-fashion editorial feel with extreme whitespace.

LAYOUT: Square ad with an olive/army-green toned product photo taking up the full background. The product (backpack) is centered vertically, and text appears above and below it. A row of four feature icons spans the bottom. PRODUCT: An olive/army green travel backpack centered in the image, shown from a front 3/4 angle. It has visible straps, buckles, and a roll-top closure. Takes up about 50% of the vertical space, centered horizontally. HEADLINE: 'Shell' in a medium-weight serif font, black, centered, approximately 24px, positioned in the top 15% of the image. SUBTEXT: 'The modern-day travel backpack' in a lighter weight sans-serif, dark gray, centered below the headline, approximately 14px. FEATURES: Four feature badges at the bottom, evenly spaced in a row: 'Weatherproof', 'Sustainable', 'Organized', 'Expandable' -- each with a small line-art icon above (umbrella, leaf, grid, arrows). Text is approximately 10px, dark gray/olive. Icons are simple line drawings. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is a muted olive/sage green (#7D8B5E approx blended with product), text is dark charcoal to black, icons are dark olive. Overall earthy palette. SPACING: Moderate padding, icons evenly distributed with about 20% width each. MOOD: Outdoor, adventurous, sustainable, premium. Clean Scandinavian-influenced design with earthy tones.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a lifestyle photo background showing a hand holding a product jar upward. Text callouts radiate outward from the product with thin lines connecting them (annotation/callout style). The background has warm natural sunlight tones. PRODUCT: A white/cream jar of body butter with 'KOPARI' branding, held up by a hand from the bottom of frame. The jar is centered and takes up about 30% of the image. The lid is off, showing the cream texture inside. HEADLINE: 'Why We Love' in a dark cursive/script font at top center (~16px), followed by 'ULTRA RESTORE BODY BUTTER' in bold magenta/hot pink uppercase sans-serif (~20px), centered. SUBTEXT: Four callout labels positioned around the jar, connected by thin pink lines radiating outward: 'Immediately 2X Skin\'s Moisture' (left), 'Instantly Hydrates' (right), 'Hyaluronic Acid' (bottom-left), 'Lighter-Than-Air Whipped Texture' (bottom-right). All in bold magenta/hot pink text approximately 12-14px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is warm beige/cream with golden sunlight (#F5E6D3 approx), text is hot pink/magenta (#FF1493 approx), product jar is white with pink branding. SPACING: Callouts spread evenly around the product with generous spacing. MOOD: Luxurious, feminine, sun-kissed, tropical. Beauty editorial with annotation-style layout.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a coral/salmon background (#F07060 approx). Product shown on the right side, text on the left side. Feature callouts stacked vertically in the center-left. Star rating and review count at the bottom center. PRODUCT: A white and orange handheld IPL hair removal device, shown at a slight angle on the right side of the frame. The device has a digital display and occupies about 35% of the image. It appears to float against the coral background with a subtle hand holding it from behind. HEADLINE: 'Tired of shaving your hoo-ha?' in white bold serif font, approximately 28px, positioned at the top spanning the full width. Provocative/attention-grabbing copy. SUBTEXT: Three feature callouts stacked vertically on the left side with curved dotted arrow lines pointing toward them: 'FDA Cleared', 'Permanent Results', 'Quick, 10 Min Treatments' -- each in white text approximately 14px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. SOCIAL PROOF: Five gold/yellow star icons at the bottom center, with '4.8/5 Stars 2,000+ Reviews' in white text below (~12px). Brand name 'nood' in white lowercase modern sans-serif at bottom right. COLORS: Coral/salmon background (#F07060), white text throughout, orange accents on the product, gold stars for rating. SPACING: Good vertical spacing between feature callouts (~20px). MOOD: Bold, cheeky, confident, modern DTC beauty. Conversational tone with social proof emphasis.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a very light gray/white background. Product centered vertically. Ingredient callouts radiate around the product in a circular pattern, connected by curved yellow swoosh lines. Text at top center. PRODUCT: A mint/teal green cylindrical supplement container labeled 'first day' with 'MULTI' on it, centered in the image. Takes up about 30% of the vertical space. Small natural ingredients (strawberries, greens, carrots) are scattered around the base. HEADLINE: 'In Just 2 Gummies' in bold dark teal/green handwritten-style font, approximately 24px, centered at the top. An underline swoosh in yellow appears beneath. SUBTEXT: Eight ingredient callouts arranged in a circle around the product: 'Vitamin A', 'Zinc', 'Vitamin C', 'Folate', 'Vitamin K', 'Vitamin B12', 'Vitamin D3', 'Magnesium' -- each in bold teal green sans-serif approximately 14px, positioned at roughly equal intervals around the product. Connected by yellow curved arrow/swoosh lines. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background is light gray (#F5F5F5) with a subtle light circle behind product, text is teal/dark green (#008080 approx), accent swooshes are yellow/gold (#FFD700), product packaging is mint green. SPACING: Callouts evenly distributed radially with ~45 degree separation. MOOD: Fresh, healthy, natural, playful. Parent-friendly health supplement with clean ingredient transparency.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a gradient background transitioning from soft pink at top to peach/coral to soft blue at bottom. A comparison layout showing two products side by side. Cloud-shaped text banner at top. PRODUCT: Left side shows a tall slim can (Recess Lime Margarita) in light green/white. Right side shows a traditional margarita glass with lime garnish. Both positioned in the lower 60% of the image. HEADLINE: 'A guilt-free way to unwind' in bold dark navy/black handwritten-style font inside a white cloud/bubble shape at the top center, approximately 22px. SUBTEXT: Two comparison columns below the cloud: Left column 'the recess "margarita"' and Right column 'the average "margarita"' in dark sans-serif approximately 14px. At the bottom: '25 Cals' (left, bold, large ~24px) vs '275 Cals' (right, bold, large ~24px) in dark text. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background gradient from pink (#FFB6C1) through peach (#FFDAB9) to light blue (#B0E0E6), text is dark navy/black, cloud shape is white. Product can is pale green/white. SPACING: Even two-column split with good vertical rhythm. MOOD: Dreamy, light, aspirational, health-conscious. Pastel gradient creates a whimsical, Instagram-friendly aesthetic with clear calorie comparison.

LAYOUT: Square ad split vertically into two columns -- left side has a light beige/cream background, right side has a soft lavender/purple background. Each column shows a competing product at top and bullet points below. Classic 'us vs them' comparison layout. PRODUCT: Left column shows a generic prenatal vitamin packet (small, partially obscured). Right column shows a 'Kin The Prenatal' purple jar with capsules spilling from the top, prominently displayed and larger (~25% of image). HEADLINE: 'Other Prenatals' (left column header, dark gray serif, ~20px) vs 'The Kin Prenatal' (right column header, dark purple serif, ~20px) at the top of each column. The Kin logo appears in a distinctive hand-drawn style. SUBTEXT: Left column has three bullet points with red X icons: 'Contains folic acid which 1 in 3 women struggle to absorb', 'Can cause nausea, acid reflux, constipation and other side effects', 'No Choline'. Right column has three bullet points with orange/amber checkmark icons: 'Contains natural Methylated Folate for baby\'s development', 'Gentle on stomach', 'Contains Choline for baby\'s brain and spinal cord development'. Text is approximately 13px dark gray serif. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Left background is cream/beige (#F5F0E8), right background is soft lavender (#E8E0F0), text is dark gray (#333333), negative indicators are red, positive indicators are orange/amber, product is deep purple. SPACING: Even 50/50 split, ~16px between bullet points, good padding from edges. MOOD: Educational, trustworthy, clinical yet warm. Comparison format builds confidence through contrast.

LAYOUT: Square ad split vertically into two equal columns -- left has a mint/sage green background, right has a beige/tan background. Each column features a product image of a pillowcase with price and features listed below. A 'VS' graphic separates the columns at the top center. PRODUCT: Left shows a pink/blush silk pillowcase by 'argie' draped naturally. Right shows a gold/champagne silk pillowcase by 'slip' draped similarly. Each takes up about 30% of their respective column. HEADLINE: 'skincare pillowcase by argie' (left, black sans-serif ~14px) and 'skincare pillowcase by slip' (right, black sans-serif ~14px). Brand names 'argie' and 'slip' are in bold larger text (~22px). SUBTEXT: Left column: '$49', 'same silk feel', 'skin expert recommended', '99.7% antibacterial', 'treated with silver' -- stacked vertically in dark text ~12px. Right column: '$99', 'mulberry silk', 'beauty expert recommended', 'for skin and hair health' -- same style. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Left background is mint/sage green (#C8E6C9 approx), right background is warm beige/tan (#E8D5B7 approx), text is dark charcoal/black, 'VS' is in a contrasting circle. SPACING: Even 50/50 columns, feature text stacked with ~12px gaps, center-aligned within each column. MOOD: Comparative, value-oriented, clean. Shows the promoted product as the more affordable alternative with equivalent quality.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a light baby blue background (#E0F7FA approx). Product centered prominently. Text callouts with speech-bubble-style annotations scattered around the product. Playful, character-driven layout with the product personified. Retailer badge in top-left. PRODUCT: A blue bottle of 'goli NUTRITION ASHWAGANDHA GUMMIES' in Mixed Berry flavor, centered, taking up about 40% of the image. A few loose red gummy pieces scattered at the bottom. HEADLINE: 'Meet Ms. Ashwadisiac' in bold dark blue serif/display font, approximately 28px, centered at the top. SUBTEXT: Multiple callout bubbles around the product in smaller text (~11px): 'You\'ll Like My Berry-Licious Flavor!' (top-right speech bubble), 'Energizing, Gluten-Free, Plant-Based & Vegan' (left), 'More Than Just A Relaxation Helper: KSM-66 Ashwagandha, Vitamin D' (right), 'Made With Love, Selfless And Good-For-You Ingredients' (bottom-left), 'Endowed With A Partner, Your Negotiation, Romantic Jazz' (bottom-right). Bottom banner: 'You can\'t miss out on a night in with this one!' in bold dark text on white strip. RETAILER: 'Available at Walmart' logo in top-left corner. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Baby blue background (#E0F7FA), dark navy text, product bottle is bright cyan/teal blue, gummies are red, Walmart spark is yellow. SPACING: Dense with callouts, but organized around the central product. MOOD: Fun, playful, personified, accessible. Walmart retail partnership ad with friendly, personable copy.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a white background. Large bold headline text dominates the top 40%. Product shown in the lower-left. Three benefit icons with labels stacked on the right side. A circular badge overlaps the product. Brand logo at bottom-left. PRODUCT: A pink and white jar/container of 'obvi. COLLAGENIC BURN ELITE' supplement, positioned in the lower-left quadrant, taking up about 30% of the image. The jar has hot pink labeling. HEADLINE: 'PCOS BELLY, BE GONE' in very large bold black uppercase sans-serif, approximately 36-40px, spanning the top. 'BE GONE' has a pink strikethrough/highlight effect through it. Below: 'Burn Elite is HERE!' in bold black text ~18px. SUBTEXT: Three benefit callouts stacked on the right side, each with a simple line icon: 'LOSE WEIGHT' (with a weight/body icon), 'CURB APPETITE' (with a stomach icon), 'BURN CALORIES' (with a flame icon) -- text in bold pink/hot pink uppercase ~14px. BADGE: A circular lime green/yellow badge with '90 DAYS' and '100% MONEY BACK' text in a circular arrangement, positioned overlapping the product jar. CTA: No explicit CTA button. Brand logo 'obvi.' in black at bottom-left. COLORS: White background, black headline text, hot pink (#FF69B4) accents and benefit text, lime green/yellow (#BFFF00) money-back badge. SPACING: Bold headline has tight leading, generous spacing between benefit icons on the right (~24px). MOOD: Empowering, bold, health-focused, feminine. Direct-response style with strong problem-solution framing and money-back guarantee.

LAYOUT: Square ad designed to look like a social media post/tweet. White card with rounded corners at the top showing a user profile and text, with a video thumbnail below taking up the bottom 60%. A teal/turquoise banner overlays the bottom of the video. PRODUCT: The product (a massage/physiotherapy device) is shown in-use in a blurry lifestyle video frame, with colorful massage balls visible. The product is not sharply shown -- the focus is on the UGC/testimonial format. HEADLINE: Tweet-style testimonial at top: 'TERRY MATTHEWS @terry_matthews' with a blue verified checkmark, followed by 'Just what the Physio ordered...' in regular dark text ~16px. SUBTEXT: A teal/turquoise (#20B2AA) banner at the bottom of the video frame reads 'POWERFUL VIBRATIONS' in white bold uppercase text ~16px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: White card background for the tweet portion, video frame has warm colorful tones (pink, yellow, green), teal banner (#20B2AA), text is dark gray/black. Profile avatar is a small circular image. SPACING: Tweet card has standard social media padding (~16px). Video fills the bottom portion edge-to-edge within the card. MOOD: Authentic, UGC-style, testimonial-driven, social proof. Mimics a Twitter/X post format for native-feeling ad.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a muted lavender/periwinkle background (#9B9ECE approx). Product shown on the left side with dramatic diagonal shadow. Text and feature badges stacked on the right side. Small disclaimer text at the bottom. PRODUCT: A tall cylindrical bottle of 'Curology' skincare product in matte purple/lavender, positioned left of center with a long diagonal shadow cast to the right. A small 'PATENT FORMULA' circular seal/badge floats above the product. Takes up about 25% of the image. HEADLINE: 'PATENTED FORMULAS' in bold white uppercase sans-serif ~24px at the top center. SUBTEXT: 'For clinically proven results' in lighter white text ~14px below the headline. Three feature badges on the right side, styled as rounded purple pill shapes: '3 personalized active ingredients', 'Formula may be adjusted over time', 'Helps prevent breakouts' -- white text on slightly darker purple badge backgrounds, ~12px. Small disclaimer at bottom: '*Results may vary. Products and ingredients subject to consultation. Subscription required. see curology.com/patents' in tiny white text ~8px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Main background is muted lavender/periwinkle (#9B9ECE), product is darker purple, text is white throughout, badges are slightly darker purple (#7B7EAE). SPACING: Product has breathing room on the left, badges stacked with ~12px gaps on the right. MOOD: Clinical, trustworthy, premium skincare. Medical-grade positioning with patent emphasis and soft purple tones.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a pink gradient background (darker pink at top fading to lighter pink). Product centered in the lower half. Bold headline at top. Feature checkmarks on the right side. Star rating and social proof at bottom center. PRODUCT: A rectangular yellow/golden bar of soap with 'sugar baby' embossed text, sitting on a light surface/shelf in the lower portion of the image. Takes up about 30% of the image. HEADLINE: 'NO MORE DARK UNDERARMS' in large bold dark text with the word 'NO MORE' slightly different treatment, approximately 28px, centered at top. SUBTEXT: Three feature lines on the right side with checkmark icons: 'RESULTS IN 3 WEEKS', 'NATURAL INGREDIENTS', '90 DAYS MONEY BACK GUARANTEE' -- in small dark text ~10px. SOCIAL PROOF: Five gold stars and 'OVER 20,000 SATISFIED CUSTOMERS' in a rounded badge at bottom center, with '20,000' in large bold pink text. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Background gradient from hot pink (#FF69B4) at top to lighter pink (#FFB6C1) at bottom, product is golden yellow, text is dark charcoal/black and white, stars are gold, social proof number is pink. SPACING: Headline has generous top padding, product sits naturally on the surface with callouts to the right. MOOD: Bold, problem-solving, feminine beauty. Direct benefit-focused with strong social proof numbers.

LAYOUT: Square ad split into two equal columns with a thin white vertical divider. Left column has a white/light gray background, right column has a bright orange background. Each column has an image at top and bullet points below. Meme-style comparison using cartoon characters. PRODUCT: No physical product shown directly. Left column shows a cartoon character (Simpsons-style) looking disheveled with messy hair representing 'sleeping on cotton pillow cases'. Right column shows a cartoon character looking happy/glamorous representing 'sleeping on Argie silk pillow cases'. HEADLINE: 'Sleeping on cotton pillow cases' (left, black bold ~14px) vs 'Sleeping on Argie silk pillow cases' (right, white bold ~14px). SUBTEXT: Left column negatives with red X icons: 'Trigger acne and odours', 'Damages hair and skin', 'Holds dust mites and fungi'. Right column positives with green checkmark icons: 'Kills 99.7% of bacteria', 'Protects hair from damage', 'Hypoallergic and breathable'. Text ~12px in respective dark/white colors. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Left background is white/light gray, right background is bright orange (#FF8C00), negative icons are red, positive icons are green, text is black (left) and white (right). SPACING: Even 50/50 split, ~12px between bullet points. MOOD: Humorous, relatable, meme-driven. Uses pop culture imagery for shareability with clear good-vs-bad comparison.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a coral/salmon pink gradient background (#FF6B6B to #FF8E8E). A hand holding a glass of protein shake extends from the bottom center. Bold headline at top. Four nutritional stat callouts positioned around the glass. Instruction text at bottom-left. PRODUCT: A clear glass filled with a chocolate/mocha-colored protein shake, held by a hand from below center. Takes up about 35% of the image vertically. The drink has a smooth, creamy texture visible through the glass. HEADLINE: 'MAKE THE MOST OUT OF YOUR MORNING' in bold white uppercase sans-serif, approximately 28px, centered at the top with tight leading. SUBTEXT: Four nutritional callouts positioned around the glass: '40G protein' (top-left, large '40G' ~24px bold white, 'protein' ~12px), '100% plant-based' (top-right), '27 vitamins & minerals' (bottom-left, large '27' ~24px), '400 calories' (bottom-right, large '400' ~24px). Bottom-left instruction: 'JUST ADD 2 SCOOPS TO WATER AND SHAKE' in bold white uppercase ~12px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Coral/salmon gradient background (#FF6B6B), all text is white, drink is chocolate brown, hand is natural skin tone. SPACING: Stats are positioned at four quadrants around the glass with ~20px from the glass edges. MOOD: Energetic, healthy, morning-routine. Bold typography with strong nutritional claims radiating around the central product.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a white/off-white background. A hand holding a glass of protein shake extends from the bottom-left. Bold headline at top. Four nutritional stat callouts positioned around the glass. Value proposition at bottom-left, brand logo at bottom-right. Nearly identical layout to the coral version but on white. PRODUCT: A clear glass filled with a chocolate/mocha-colored protein shake, held by a hand from the lower-left. Takes up about 35% of the image. HEADLINE: 'America\'s new favorite lunch' in bold black serif/sans-serif, approximately 26px, positioned at top-left, left-aligned. SUBTEXT: Four nutritional callouts around the glass with curved arrow lines pointing to them: '40g protein' (upper-left), 'Vegan' (upper-right), '27 vitamins & minerals' (left), '400 calories' (lower-right) -- each in black text with the number large (~20px bold) and descriptor smaller (~11px). Bottom-left: '34 meals for $2.50 per meal' in a rounded yellow/green badge. Brand: 'Huel' logo at bottom-right in bold black ~16px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: White/off-white background, black text throughout, subtle curved arrow lines in black, value badge has a yellow-green tint. SPACING: Clean and open, callouts arranged organically around the central glass. MOOD: Clean, nutritional, practical, value-focused. Minimalist white background emphasizes the product and nutritional stats. Brand-forward with Huel positioning.

LAYOUT: Square ad split roughly in half -- top portion is a lifestyle photo of a woman using a beauty device, bottom portion is white with promotional text. The photo has overlaid handwritten-style text. Diagonal split between photo and white section. PRODUCT: A handheld microcurrent/beauty device (small, white, cylindrical) being used on the woman's face. She is lying down among pink roses. The device is small, maybe 10% of the image. HEADLINE: 'I\'m obsessed with this!' in a bold handwritten/brush script font, dark charcoal, overlaid on the photo portion, approximately 24px. 'with this!' has a pink highlight/background behind it. SUBTEXT: Bottom white section: 'FREE GIFT' in very bold black uppercase sans-serif ~32px, followed by '4PK HYDRATE & GLOW BUNDLE' in bold black uppercase ~16px below. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Photo has warm pink/rose tones, white bottom section, black text, pink highlight accent on 'with this!'. SPACING: Photo takes top 55%, white section takes bottom 45%. Text is centered in the white section with ~16px between lines. MOOD: Aspirational, gifting, beauty-obsessed. UGC-feeling lifestyle photo combined with promotional offer below. Feminine and luxurious.

LAYOUT: Square ad split into top and bottom halves. Top half is a lifestyle photo of a man's face/beard in close-up. Bottom half is white with a row of four product images evenly spaced. Question headline overlays the photo. PRODUCT: Four grooming products displayed in a row at the bottom: a beard roller (derma roller), an activator bottle, a cleanser bottle, and a keychain comb. Each is approximately 20% width, evenly spaced. All products are black/dark colored. HEADLINE: 'What\'s inside the beard growth kit?' in bold black sans-serif, approximately 22px, overlaid on the top photo. 'growth kit' is in extra bold/italic for emphasis. SUBTEXT: Labels beneath each product in the bottom row: 'BEARD ROLLER', 'ACTIVATOR', 'CLEANSER', 'KEYCHAIN COMB' -- each in bold black uppercase ~10px, italicized. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Top photo has warm natural skin tones, bottom section is clean white, product items are all black/dark, text is black. SPACING: Four products evenly spaced in the bottom half with ~5% margins between them. Top photo and bottom product grid are roughly 50/50. MOOD: Masculine, grooming, kit-reveal. Clean product showcase with a what's-in-the-box unboxing feel. Curiosity-driven headline.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a warm cream/off-white background with subtle golden sparkle/dust effects in corners. Product photo centered with soft natural lighting and shadows from window blinds. Elegant editorial style. A circular stamp/badge on the right side. PRODUCT: A pair of thick gold hoop earrings lying on a light fabric/surface, centered in the image. They catch light beautifully, showing polished gold finish. Take up about 35% of the image. HEADLINE: 'JEWELRY' in large bold gold/dark serif font at the top, approximately 32px, centered. SUBTEXT: 'New Collection' in an elegant cursive/script font below the headline, approximately 18px, gold/brown color. A circular stamp reads 'STYLE' repeated in a circle on the right side of the image, approximately 40px diameter. Website: 'REALLYGREATSITE.COM' in small uppercase at the bottom center ~10px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Warm cream/ivory background (#FAF3E8), gold accents and sparkle particles, text is dark gold/brown (#8B6914), earrings are polished gold. Sparkle/dust effects are gold/glitter. SPACING: Product centered with generous padding all around, headline at top with ~20px below it for subtitle. MOOD: Luxurious, elegant, editorial, premium jewelry. Warm golden tones with natural window-light shadows create an aspirational boutique feel.

LAYOUT: Square ad designed to look like a news article/headline from Daily Mail Australia. White background with newspaper-style masthead at top. A headline in large serif font. Two side-by-side photos of women at the bottom. Fake editorial/PR placement style. PRODUCT: Product is not directly shown -- the ad references a '$30 Australian BB cream' through the headline text. Two lifestyle photos of women (before/after or user testimonials) fill the bottom half. HEADLINE: Daily Mail Australia masthead at top in classic newspaper serif font. Below: 'Latest Headlines' in gray italic. Main headline: a newspaper-style headline about a BB cream product with reviews -- in bold black serif font approximately 22px. SUBTEXT: No additional body text visible. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: White background, black text, Daily Mail red/maroon for 'Daily Mail' text, photos have warm natural skin tones. SPACING: Newspaper-style layout with masthead, section label, headline, and photos stacked vertically. Standard editorial padding. MOOD: Credibility-driven, editorial, PR-style. Uses newspaper format to lend authority and social proof. Third-party endorsement feel.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a soft lavender/periwinkle background (#E8E0F8 approx). Bold headline text at top-left taking up about 30% of the space. Product bottle on the right side with subtle wavy/ribbed texture pattern behind it. Ingredient list with pill/capsule icons stacked vertically on the left. Small disclaimer at bottom. Brand icon at bottom-right. PRODUCT: A tall white cylindrical bottle with 'Curology' branding in dark text, positioned on the right side. Takes up about 20% of the image. Behind it are soft white wavy lines creating a texture/pattern effect. HEADLINE: 'Customized skincare for breakouts and beyond.' in bold dark navy/charcoal serif, approximately 26px, top-left aligned. 'breakouts and beyond.' is underlined with a blue/lavender line. SUBTEXT: 'Active ingredients that really work.' in bold dark text ~14px. Below that, four ingredients listed with small circular pill/capsule icons: 'Tretinoin' (with 'Tr' icon), 'Niacinamide' (with 'Ni' icon), 'Azelaic Acid' (with 'Az A' icon), '...And more! Take our skin quiz to find your custom mix.' (with 'Cl' icon). Each ~13px in dark text. Disclaimer at bottom: 'Ingredients subject to consultation. Results may vary.' in tiny light text ~8px. CTA: Implicit CTA in text: 'Take our skin quiz to find your custom mix.' Brand 'C' icon at bottom-right corner. COLORS: Soft lavender background (#E8E0F8), dark navy text (#1A1A3E), ingredient icons in various soft pastel colors (peach, blue, lavender), product is white. SPACING: Good left-aligned vertical spacing, ~16px between ingredients. MOOD: Clinical, personalized, trustworthy. Medical-grade skincare positioning with ingredient transparency and quiz CTA.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a vivid gradient background transitioning from hot pink/magenta at top-left to deep purple at bottom-right. Product centered-right. Headline at top-left. Three benefit badges with icons stacked on the left. Press logos bar at the bottom. PRODUCT: A pink/magenta stand-up pouch of 'spacegoods Rainbow Dust v1.0 Chocolate Flavour' positioned center-right. A scoop of brown powder and a glass of dark liquid are at the bottom. Takes up about 30% of the image. HEADLINE: 'Why Spacegoods\' Mushroom Coffee?' in bold white sans-serif, approximately 22px, top-left aligned. SUBTEXT: Three benefit callouts on the left side, each with a small circular icon: 'NO BRAIN FOG' (with cloud icon), 'SHARPER FOCUS' (with lightning bolt icon), 'ALL DAY ENERGY' (with sparkle icon) -- in bold white uppercase sans-serif ~14px, with white checkmarks. PRESS BAR: 'AS SEEN ON' in white text at bottom, followed by media logos: 'marie claire', 'GQ', 'Men\'s Health', 'Esquire' in white. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Hot pink/magenta (#FF1493) to deep purple (#4B0082) gradient background, white text throughout, product pouch is bright pink/magenta, powder is brown. SPACING: Left-aligned text stack with ~16px between benefits. Press logos evenly spaced at bottom. MOOD: Vibrant, energetic, trendy, wellness. Bold gradient with media credibility creates a premium functional wellness feel.

LAYOUT: Square ad designed to look like an iPhone Notes app screenshot. Yellow/cream note paper background with standard iOS Notes UI chrome at top (back arrow, date, share icon). Handwritten-feel content below. Product image in the bottom-right corner. PRODUCT: A packet of 'EVERYDAY DOSE MUSHROOM COFFEE' shown in the bottom-right corner, approximately 25% of the image. It is a tan/kraft paper-style pouch with dark text. HEADLINE: 'Why I\'m ditching coffee in 2024 for this' in bold black serif font, approximately 22px, left-aligned, positioned like a note title. Includes small mushroom emoji-style icons. SUBTEXT: Three bullet points with amber/gold checkmark icons: 'All day focus and energy', 'Zero crash or jitters', 'Functional mushroom & adaptogenic blend' -- in regular dark text ~14px, left-aligned. iOS Notes UI elements: '< Notes' back link in orange at top-left, '13 February 2024 at 11:51pm' date in gray. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Pale yellow/cream background (#FFF9E6) mimicking Notes app, black text, orange iOS accent color for navigation, amber/gold checkmarks, product pouch is tan/brown. SPACING: Standard Notes app padding (~20px sides), ~16px between bullet points. MOOD: Authentic, native, organic feel. Disguised-as-content format mimics a personal note/discovery. UGC-style trust through casual format.

LAYOUT: Wide/landscape format (approximately 2:1 ratio) lifestyle photo with text overlay at bottom-left. Full-bleed photo of two women in loungewear. Minimal text overlay -- just a ranking badge and CTA. PRODUCT: Two women wearing matching oversized loungewear/tracksuits (one in orange, one in lavender/purple). The clothing IS the product. They are posed casually, filling the entire frame. HEADLINE: '#1 BEST SELLER' in large bold white text with a metallic/gradient effect, approximately 28px, positioned at bottom-left. '#1' is extra large (~36px). SUBTEXT: None. CTA: 'SHOP NOW' in black text on a white rounded rectangular button, approximately 100px wide x 30px tall, positioned below the headline at bottom-left. COLORS: Photo has warm indoor tones, orange and lavender clothing colors. Text is white with slight shadow for readability. CTA button is white with black text. SPACING: Text cluster is compact at bottom-left corner with ~8px between headline and CTA. MOOD: Trendy, comfortable, casual-luxe. Fashion lifestyle shot with minimal copy -- letting the product/models do the selling. Best-seller social proof.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a warm cream/off-white background (#FFF8E7 approx). Side-by-side comparison with three rows. Left column shows branded bowls of fresh food, right column shows metal bowls of processed kibble. Brand logo at top-left, 'VS' badge at top-center, competitor label at top-right. PRODUCT: Three ceramic/paper bowls of fresh dog food (Beef, Turkey, Lamb) on the left side, each with visible fresh ingredients. Three metal dog bowls of brown processed kibble on the right side. Each pair is on the same row for direct comparison. HEADLINE: 'lyka' brand logo (teal/green, lowercase, rounded font ~24px) at top-left. 'VS' in a red circle badge at top-center. 'Processed Dog Food' in bold black text at top-right ~18px. SUBTEXT: Three labels on the left between the bowl pairs: 'Beef', 'Turkey', 'Lamb' -- each in a colored pill/tag shape (pink for Beef, yellow for Turkey, green for Lamb), approximately 12px bold. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Cream background (#FFF8E7), teal/green brand color (#20B2AA), red VS badge, colored food labels (pink, yellow, green), processed food bowls are silver/metal. SPACING: Three rows evenly spaced vertically, 50/50 column split with VS badge at intersection. ~16px between rows. MOOD: Natural, healthy, comparative. Fresh vs processed visual contrast makes the value proposition immediately obvious. Pet-parent focused.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a soft green/matcha-toned background (#E8F5E9 to white gradient). Bold headline at top. A testimonial review card in the center. Product and matcha powder scattered at the bottom. Brand logo at bottom-left. PRODUCT: A green packet/pouch of 'RYZE MUSHROOM MATCHA' positioned in the bottom-right, partially cut off. Loose green matcha powder is scattered/sprinkled across the bottom of the image, and matcha leaves are visible. Takes up about 20% of the image. HEADLINE: 'Say No To Bloating' in very bold dark green/black display font, approximately 32px, centered at top. SUBTEXT: A white rounded rectangle testimonial card centered below the headline: five gold stars at top, followed by review text in dark serif approximately 12px, ending with '~ Roseanne M. (Verified Reviewer)' in italic. CTA: No explicit CTA button. Brand logo 'RYZE' at bottom-left in small text. COLORS: Soft green/matcha gradient background, dark green/black headline text, white testimonial card, gold stars (#FFD700), green matcha powder and product packaging. SPACING: Headline at top with ~20px margin, testimonial card centered with ~16px padding inside, product and powder at bottom. MOOD: Natural, healthy, testimonial-driven. Clean green aesthetic with social proof review card. Gut-health focused messaging.

LAYOUT: Wide/landscape format (approximately 2:1 ratio). Split roughly into left and right sections. Teal/green background. Bold uppercase headline at top spanning full width. Two products shown side by side with price tags. PRODUCT: Left shows a can of tuna (John West brand) with a price tag '£1.06'. Right shows a pile of shredded chicken with a price tag '£1.56'. Both products are on a light wooden surface. Each takes up about 30% of the frame. HEADLINE: 'SWAP TO SAVE' in bold white uppercase sans-serif, approximately 28px, centered at the top. SUBTEXT: Price labels '£1.06' and '£1.56' in bold text on circular/oval white badges near each product, approximately 16px. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Teal/dark green background (#2E8B57 approx), white headline text, price badges are white with dark text, product packaging is teal/green (John West brand). SPACING: Two products side-by-side with roughly equal spacing. Headline centered above. MOOD: Value-conscious, practical, budget-friendly. Simple swap comparison showing price savings. Grocery/household budget messaging.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a lifestyle photo of a smiling man on the left side (~50%) and a testimonial quote card overlaid on the right side (~50%). Light gray/neutral background behind the man. Large quotation marks accent the review card. PRODUCT: No product directly shown. The man is wearing a dark green/olive t-shirt which is presumably the product being reviewed. The focus is on fit and testimonial. HEADLINE: No traditional headline. Large dark teal/green quotation marks ('66' style) at the top of the testimonial area, approximately 48px. SUBTEXT: Five dark teal stars at the top of the quote card. Below: testimonial text in dark teal/green serif font approximately 14px on a white rounded rectangle card with slight shadow. The review discusses t-shirt quality and fit. '~ Reviewer Name' attribution style. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Light gray background (#F0F0F0), dark teal/forest green (#2F4F4F) for stars and quotation marks, white quote card, man wearing olive/dark green t-shirt. SPACING: Photo takes left ~50%, quote card overlaps slightly from the right ~50%, with ~16px internal padding in the card. MOOD: Authentic, masculine, testimonial-driven. Clean and confident with social proof focus. Premium basics brand feel.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a split background -- pink/coral (#FFB4B4) on the left/top portion and cream/off-white on the right/bottom. A lifestyle photo showing a hand reaching for watermelon slices is on the left side. Product bottle and numbered benefit list on the right side. Value badge in bottom-left. CTA button at bottom-center. PRODUCT: A bottle of 'hint' flavored water shown on the right side, approximately 20% of the image. Clear bottle with fruit imagery on the label. HEADLINE: '4 reasons to try Hint' in bold blue handwritten/display font, approximately 24px, centered at the top spanning the full width. SUBTEXT: Four numbered benefits on the right side, each with a colored circle number (1-4 in coral/red): '1. Refreshing water with true fruit flavor', '2. New customers get 45% off + FREE shipping' (with bold on the offer), '3. Hint has 0 calories, 0 sweeteners, 0 sugar', '4. Choose from our top selling flavors including new Strawberry Lemon' -- each in dark text approximately 11px. VALUE BADGE: '$1 per bottle' in a yellow circle badge in the bottom-left area. CTA: 'Quench your thirst' in dark text on a yellow/gold rounded rectangle button at the bottom center, approximately 180px wide x 36px tall. COLORS: Pink/coral (#FFB4B4) left background, cream right background, blue headline, red/coral number circles, yellow CTA button and value badge, product bottle is clear with hints of color. SPACING: Photo on left ~40%, text/product on right ~60%. Benefits stacked with ~12px gaps. MOOD: Fresh, fruity, health-conscious, promotional. Playful color palette with clear value proposition and numbered reasons format.

LAYOUT: Wide/landscape format (approximately 3:1 ratio). Designed to look like a news article headline from The Daily Dot Australia. White background with newspaper masthead, headline text, and a lifestyle photo of a woman. Minimal layout -- masthead, headline, image. PRODUCT: No product directly shown in the visible portion. A pink jar/container is partially visible at the edge. The woman in the photo appears to be showing/using a body product. HEADLINE: Newspaper-style masthead 'The Daily Dot AUSTRALIA' at top. Below: article headline text about a body lotion product that references price, popularity, and skin benefits -- in bold black serif font approximately 16px. SUBTEXT: None visible beyond the headline. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: White background, black text, newspaper masthead styling, lifestyle photo has warm beach/outdoor tones with the woman having sun-kissed skin. SPACING: Standard news article layout -- masthead, then headline, then image, stacked vertically. MOOD: Editorial, PR-placement, credibility-driven. Fake news article format lends authority. Beach lifestyle imagery adds aspirational element.

LAYOUT: Square ad with a gradient background -- dark charcoal/black at bottom transitioning to warm gray at top. Product floating above an open palm/hand at bottom center. Star rating and testimonial text in the upper portion. A highlighted quote badge. CTA button below the testimonial. PRODUCT: A dark/black insulated travel mug/thermos floating above an outstretched hand at the bottom of the image. The mug appears to be hovering/levitating, creating a magical effect. Takes up about 25% of the image. HEADLINE: Five gold/yellow stars at the very top center (~24px each). Below: 'Holy S**t, this product is amazing!' in white italic serif font, approximately 22px. SUBTEXT: A highlighted quote in a rounded beige/tan badge: 'THIS S**T IS PRETTY MUCH HOGWARTS-LEVEL MAGIC!' in bold dark uppercase ~10px. Below: '* Tom Brown' in white text ~14px. CTA: 'SHOP NOW' in dark brown/charcoal text on a rounded white/cream button, approximately 140px wide x 36px tall, positioned below the testimonial. COLORS: Dark gradient background from black (#1A1A1A) at bottom to warm dark gray (#3D3D3D) at top, gold stars (#FFD700), white text, cream/tan quote badge, product is matte black. SPACING: Stars and text centered vertically in the top 60%, product and hand in the bottom 40%. ~16px between text elements. MOOD: Dark, premium, magical, testimonial-driven. The levitating product creates wonder. Edgy/irreverent copy tone with strong social proof.

LAYOUT: Square ad divided into a 2x2 grid with four quadrants. Top-left has text on dark purple background. Top-right shows product bottle on dark purple. Bottom-left shows a lifestyle photo of a couple in bed. Bottom-right has large stat text on dark purple. 'NEW PRODUCT' diagonal banner in top-right corner. PRODUCT: A purple bottle of 'goli EXTRA-STRENGTH SLEEP' gummies shown in the top-right quadrant, approximately 20% of the total image. The bottle has dark purple packaging with white text. A few loose dark purple gummies are scattered nearby. HEADLINE: Top-left quadrant: 'Introducing the NEW Goli' in white italic text ~12px, followed by 'EXTRA-STRENGTH SLEEP GUMMIES' in bold white uppercase sans-serif ~22px. 'SLEEP' is the largest word. SUBTEXT: Bottom-right quadrant: '10MG MELATONIN PER SERVING' in large bold white text ~28px, with 'goli' logo below. Bottom-left shows a happy older couple lying in bed together, smiling. BANNER: 'NEW PRODUCT' on a diagonal magenta/pink ribbon banner in the top-right corner of the overall image. CTA: No explicit CTA button. COLORS: Dark purple (#2D1B4E) dominant background color across three quadrants, white text throughout, product is deep purple, banner is magenta/hot pink. Bottom-left photo has warm bedroom tones. 'goli' logo in white. SPACING: Even 2x2 grid with thin gaps between quadrants (~2px). Each quadrant is a self-contained visual unit. MOOD: Restful, premium, clinical. Dark purple sleep-associated palette with product launch energy from the banner. Multi-panel format packs information density.
